name: color-kit-workspace
description: A queryable color-space engine for building color tooling: OKLCH-canonical conversion, contrast, gamut geometry, and plane queries, with React bindings as one consumer

scripts.dev:prepare: pnpm --filter @color-kit/core build && pnpm --filter @color-kit/driver build && pnpm --filter @color-kit/core-wasm build:all && pnpm --filter @color-kit/react build && pnpm --filter color-kit build
scripts.ci:wasm-parity: pnpm --filter @color-kit/core build && pnpm --filter @color-kit/core-wasm build && pnpm --filter @color-kit/core-wasm build:wasm && pnpm --filter @color-kit/react test:wasm-parity:strict
scripts.release:verify: pnpm check:preprod && pnpm build && pnpm check:artifacts && pnpm test && pnpm lint && pnpm ci:wasm && pnpm ci:wasm-parity
scripts.check:preprod: node scripts/check-preproduction.mjs && pnpm test:registry-sync && node scripts/check-registry-sync.mjs
scripts.publish:next: pnpm release:verify && pnpm --filter color-kit publish --access public --tag next --no-git-checks
scripts.publish:next:dry: pnpm release:verify && pnpm --filter color-kit publish --access public --tag next --no-git-checks --dry-run

author: pbroom
